extra.reason: Replaced polybar-topprocess with a compiled procfs sampler and enabled NetworkManager Wi-Fi power save; remaining xwindow title warning filed separately.
Implemented polybar-status Rust helper, wired Polybar to it, verified build/switch/runtime
Replaced internal/xwindow with sanitized polybar-status title helper
Implemented and verified tray/date/time ordering plus whole low-battery label blinking
Added a targeted udev rule for Logitech Unifying receiver 046d:c52b so USB autosuspend remains global but the mouse dongle stays at power/control=on.

Replaced breezy-desktop upstream overlay use with a local equivalent overlay using prev.stdenv.hostPlatform.system. Verified NIX_ABORT_ON_WARN now advances to the Stylix Qt warning instead of the system alias warning.

Added systemd-boot install hook that selects the newest nixos-generation-*-specialisation-herbstluftwm-dark.conf entry. Verified /boot/loader/loader.conf defaults to generation 2063 herbstluftwm-dark after nrs.
Split CPU frequency into its own Rust-backed Polybar module before freqmenu, added cpu-freq --tail, and verified live Polybar loads status cpufreq freqmenu with the helper running.

Added bounded Polybar wrapper shutdown: send TERM, wait up to about 2s, then KILL remaining Polybar pids. Verified nrs stopped polybar-dark.service immediately without timeout and restarted it cleanly.

Implemented cpuload as a separate Rust-backed Polybar module ordered before cpufreq and freqmenu. Added a render test that 0% CPU cores use foreground-alt dimming. Verified cargo tests, nix build, nrs, generated Polybar config, service logs, and live helper processes.
Implemented NetworkManager D-Bus SSID lookup in the Rust Polybar helper. Verified cargo tests, right --once prints Mastiff, no real nmcli dev wifi process remains, and nix build succeeds.
Made the unnamed boot generation explicit herbstluftwm/dark, removed option/module defaults, restored top boot entry selection, and measured rebuild/evaluation timings.
Implemented desktop-agnostic TLP/thermald power policy, removed auto-cpufreq, disabled PPD and powertop auto-tune, preserved charge thresholds, and verified build/switch/runtime state.
Fixed xss-lock i3lock wallpaper path by using systemd user-service %h expansion instead of a literal shell $HOME path, then verified NixOS option evaluation and full nix build.
Set explicit AC percentage P-state limits so TLP restores max_perf_pct=100 on AC while keeping the portable 50% battery cap.
Removed from task list per user request
Removed from task list per user request
Committed in 38802d5 and 9e2e29f. noctalia-niri specialization booted, autologin via greetd default_session works, noctalia bar renders after first-run wizard.
Implemented: home/noctalia/ + home/niri/noctalia.kdl tracked in repo via mkOutOfStoreSymlink. Build verified, nvd shows zero changes to other specs.
